tasks.label: Debug GeneralsXZH (WinDbg GUI)
args: cd $env:USERPROFILE\GeneralsX\GeneralsMD; Write-Host 'Starting WinDbg GUI debugger...' -ForegroundColor Cyan; windbg.exe .\GeneralsXZH.exe -win 2>&1 | Tee-Object -FilePath ${workspaceFolder}\logs\debugTerminal_vc6.log

tasks.label: Debug GeneralsX (WinDbg GUI)
args: cd $env:USERPROFILE\GeneralsX\Generals; Write-Host 'Starting WinDbg GUI debugger...' -ForegroundColor Cyan; windbg.exe .\GeneralsX.exe -win 2>&1 | Tee-Object -FilePath ${workspaceFolder}\logs\debugTerminal_generalsv.log

tasks.label: Crash Analysis GeneralsXZH (CDB)
args: cd $env:USERPROFILE\GeneralsX\GeneralsMD; Write-Host 'Starting CDB crash analysis...' -ForegroundColor Cyan; $cdb=(Get-Command cdb.exe -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue).Source; if(-not $cdb){$candidates=@("$env:ProgramFiles\Windows Kits\10\Debuggers\x86\cdb.exe","$env:ProgramFiles\Windows Kits\10\Debuggers\x64\cdb.exe","$env:ProgramFiles\Windows Kits\11\Debuggers\x86\cdb.exe","$env:ProgramFiles\Windows Kits\11\Debuggers\x64\cdb.exe","$env:ProgramFiles(x86)\Windows Kits\10\Debuggers\x86\cdb.exe","$env:ProgramFiles(x86)\Windows Kits\10\Debuggers\x64\cdb.exe","$env:ProgramFiles(x86)\Windows Kits\11\Debuggers\x86\cdb.exe","$env:ProgramFiles(x86)\Windows Kits\11\Debuggers\x64\cdb.exe"); $cdb=$candidates | Where-Object { Test-Path $_ } | Select-Object -First 1 }; if(-not $cdb){Write-Error 'cdb.exe not found. Run task: Install CDB.exe (Windows SDK)'; exit 1}; & $cdb -c 'g; .lastevent; kb; q' .\GeneralsXZH.exe -win -noshellmap 2>&1 | Tee-Object -FilePath ${workspaceFolder}\logs\cdbTerminal_vc6.log

tasks.label: Crash Analysis GeneralsX (CDB)
args: cd $env:USERPROFILE\GeneralsX\Generals; Write-Host 'Starting CDB crash analysis...' -ForegroundColor Cyan; $cdb=(Get-Command cdb.exe -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue).Source; if(-not $cdb){$candidates=@("$env:ProgramFiles\Windows Kits\10\Debuggers\x86\cdb.exe","$env:ProgramFiles\Windows Kits\10\Debuggers\x64\cdb.exe","$env:ProgramFiles\Windows Kits\11\Debuggers\x86\cdb.exe","$env:ProgramFiles\Windows Kits\11\Debuggers\x64\cdb.exe","$env:ProgramFiles(x86)\Windows Kits\10\Debuggers\x86\cdb.exe","$env:ProgramFiles(x86)\Windows Kits\10\Debuggers\x64\cdb.exe","$env:ProgramFiles(x86)\Windows Kits\11\Debuggers\x86\cdb.exe","$env:ProgramFiles(x86)\Windows Kits\11\Debuggers\x64\cdb.exe"); $cdb=$candidates | Where-Object { Test-Path $_ } | Select-Object -First 1 }; if(-not $cdb){Write-Error 'cdb.exe not found. Run task: Install CDB.exe (Windows SDK)'; exit 1}; & $cdb -c 'g; .lastevent; kb; q' .\GeneralsX.exe -win 2>&1 | Tee-Object -FilePath ${workspaceFolder}\logs\cdbTerminal_generalsv.log

tasks.label: Verify CDB.exe (Debugging Tools)
args: $cmd=(Get-Command cdb.exe -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue); if($cmd){Write-Host ('Found cdb.exe in PATH: ' + $cmd.Source) -ForegroundColor Green; exit 0}; $candidates=@("$env:ProgramFiles\Windows Kits\10\Debuggers\x86\cdb.exe","$env:ProgramFiles\Windows Kits\10\Debuggers\x64\cdb.exe","$env:ProgramFiles\Windows Kits\11\Debuggers\x86\cdb.exe","$env:ProgramFiles\Windows Kits\11\Debuggers\x64\cdb.exe","$env:ProgramFiles(x86)\Windows Kits\10\Debuggers\x86\cdb.exe","$env:ProgramFiles(x86)\Windows Kits\10\Debuggers\x64\cdb.exe","$env:ProgramFiles(x86)\Windows Kits\11\Debuggers\x86\cdb.exe","$env:ProgramFiles(x86)\Windows Kits\11\Debuggers\x64\cdb.exe"); $found=$candidates | Where-Object { Test-Path $_ } | Select-Object -First 1; if($found){Write-Host ('Found cdb.exe at: ' + $found) -ForegroundColor Yellow; exit 0}; Write-Error 'cdb.exe not found (neither PATH nor common Windows Kits locations). Run task: Install CDB.exe (Windows SDK)'; exit 1
